title: Vacancy for Teacher at IIT Delhi

jsonLd.title: Vacancy for Teacher at IIT Delhi
jsonLd.description:
IIT Delhi, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Teacher for our Nashik operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About IIT Delhi:
IIT Delhi is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Support students with special educational needs
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Child Psychology
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum
• Proficiency in Data Analysis
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in Educational Technology

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Annual performance appraisal
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Nashik, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with IIT Delhi!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
